message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Updates the beads issue tracker JSONL export to reflect current state:
- Reviewed and closed GitHub Issues #9 and #11
- Issue #11: Fixed SHA256SUMS checksum mismatch (ubs script updated Dec 31
  but checksums weren't regenerated)
- Issue #9: Confirmed already fixed (AST-based division detection from
  Nov 23 commits 9583f87 and 5f8d235 prevents import path false positives)
- Additional fix for #11: Resolved git pre-commit hook PATH issue where
  ~/.local/bin wasn't in PATH for git subprocesses

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
